creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
Hi, maintainer:

   Shall we ask for a exp-run for this patch ?

   And matplotlib-3.0.0 had been released which only support python3, I suggest math/py-matplotlib should be repocopied to math/py-matplotlib2 and update math/py-matplotlib to 3.0.0, how do you think ?

Regards,
wen
